sourceWarning: The restaurant does not publish a complete allergen matrix. Signals come only from explicit terms in current restaurant-linked Square item titles and descriptions; all other allergens and cross-contact status remain unavailable.

items.name: Caponata
items.description: Sicilian eggplant relish. Eggplant with onions, celery, raisins, tomato, pine nuts, olives and capers. Sweet and savory! Served with a side of bread.
items.ingredientsText: Sicilian eggplant relish. Eggplant with onions, celery, raisins, tomato, pine nuts, olives and capers. Sweet and savory! Served with a side of bread.

items.name: Cod Croquettes
items.description: House cured salt cod with potato, cream and garlic.Served with garlic aioli and a lemon.
items.ingredientsText: House cured salt cod with potato, cream and garlic.Served with garlic aioli and a lemon.

items.name: Deviled Eggs
items.description: 5 deviled eggs with a mustardy schmoo and a chunky green sauce with parsley, anchovies, pickles and mustard on the side.
items.ingredientsText: 5 deviled eggs with a mustardy schmoo and a chunky green sauce with parsley, anchovies, pickles and mustard on the side.

items.name: Polpettine al Forno
items.description: Meatballs! Mm mm mm! (pork and beef from our dairy cow). Served with a side of bread.
items.ingredientsText: Meatballs! Mm mm mm! (pork and beef from our dairy cow). Served with a side of bread.

items.name: Suppli a Telefono
items.description: Risotto with fresh mozzarella in the center and then breaded and fried. Lovingly called "rice balls" by our tiny diners.
items.ingredientsText: Risotto with fresh mozzarella in the center and then breaded and fried. Lovingly called "rice balls" by our tiny diners.

items.name: 2amys Salami 50g
items.description: Autumn Olive Farms pork, salt, pepper and a splash of wine.
items.ingredientsText: Autumn Olive Farms pork, salt, pepper and a splash of wine.

items.name: Bloomsday
items.description: One of our favorite cow's milk cheeses from the nicest farmer in Colchester, CT, Cato Corner Farms. Served with seasonal jam. (**Jam may contain nuts.**)
items.ingredientsText: One of our favorite cow's milk cheeses from the nicest farmer in Colchester, CT, Cato Corner Farms. Served with seasonal jam. (**Jam may contain nuts.**)

items.name: Cantabrian Anchovies
items.description: Salt cured and hand filleted anchovies from the Cantabrian Sea. Served with a side of bread and butter.
items.ingredientsText: Salt cured and hand filleted anchovies from the Cantabrian Sea. Served with a side of bread and butter.

items.name: Marinated Olives
items.description: Chilled Termite di Bitteto olives marinated with celery, chili, lemon zest, garlic and mint.
items.ingredientsText: Chilled Termite di Bitteto olives marinated with celery, chili, lemon zest, garlic and mint.

items.name: Pio Tosini 100g
items.description: Pio Tosini is a family owned and operated ham curer steeped in tradition. A little less salt, just the right wind and a longer aging process leads to a sweeter more perfect prosciutto. Served with a side of bread.
items.ingredientsText: Pio Tosini is a family owned and operated ham curer steeped in tradition. A little less salt, just the right wind and a longer aging process leads to a sweeter more perfect prosciutto. Served with a side of bread.

items.description: Sardinian sheep's milk ricotta with local honeycomb. Served with a side of bread.
items.ingredientsText: Sardinian sheep's milk ricotta with local honeycomb. Served with a side of bread.

items.name: Sicilian Anchovies
items.description: Salt cured and hand filleted anchovies from the Mediterranean Sea. Served with a side of bread and butter.
items.ingredientsText: Salt cured and hand filleted anchovies from the Mediterranean Sea. Served with a side of bread and butter.

items.name: Grilled Peppers and Anchovies
items.description: Grilled and marinated red and yellow peppers with salt-cured sicilian anchovies. Served with a side of bread.
items.ingredientsText: Grilled and marinated red and yellow peppers with salt-cured sicilian anchovies. Served with a side of bread.

items.name: TO GO Contadi Castaldi Franciacorta Brut

items.name: TO GO Selvapiana Chianti Rufina 2024
items.description: From the smallest & highest of the eight chianti subzones, depending on how you choose to count.95% Sangiovese, various other amounts of Canaiolo, Colorino, and Malvasia Nera.

items.name: TO GO Tua Rita Rosso dei Notri 2024
items.description: From a fancy winery in The Maremma all done in cement.Cab Sauv, Merlot, Syrah, and Cab Franc in random proportions.
items.ingredientsText: From a fancy winery in The Maremma all done in cement.Cab Sauv, Merlot, Syrah, and Cab Franc in random proportions.

items.name: TO GO Great Notion Brewing: Easy Lift
items.description: Classic pine and grapefruit aromas meet red berry and pineapple flavor in this West Coast IPA (16 fl. oz., 6.3% ABV).
items.ingredientsText: Classic pine and grapefruit aromas meet red berry and pineapple flavor in this West Coast IPA (16 fl. oz., 6.3% ABV).

items.name: TO GO Manor Hill: Katherine’s Kölsch
items.description: This kolsch from Ellicott City, MD has floral, citrus and stone fruit hop aromas (12 fl. oz., 5% ABV.).
items.ingredientsText: This kolsch from Ellicott City, MD has floral, citrus and stone fruit hop aromas (12 fl. oz., 5% ABV.).

items.name: TO GO Off Color: Crispy Beer for Pizza
items.description: Crisp, hoppy Pilsner. Finish will wipe your palate clean for the next bite of pie (12 fl. oz., 5% abv).
items.ingredientsText: Crisp, hoppy Pilsner. Finish will wipe your palate clean for the next bite of pie (12 fl. oz., 5% abv).

items.name: TO GO Samuel Smith: Organic Cider
items.description: Medium dry, light body, clean apple flavor and a gentle apple blossom finish (12 fl. oz., 5% ABV).
items.ingredientsText: Medium dry, light body, clean apple flavor and a gentle apple blossom finish (12 fl. oz., 5% ABV).

items.name: TO GO Schilling: Especial
items.description: A Mexican-style Lager with notes of sweet corn, subtle hay and cracker, with a touch of herbal hopcharacter, dry finish with a hint of bitterness (16 fl. oz., 5% ABV).
items.ingredientsText: A Mexican-style Lager with notes of sweet corn, subtle hay and cracker, with a touch of herbal hopcharacter, dry finish with a hint of bitterness (16 fl. oz., 5% ABV).

items.name: TO GO Triple Crossing: Tiny Pils
items.description: A light bodied, floral, clean and refreshing German-style pilsner from Richmond, VA (16 fl. oz., 3.8% ABV.).
items.ingredientsText: A light bodied, floral, clean and refreshing German-style pilsner from Richmond, VA (16 fl. oz., 3.8% ABV.).

items.name: TO GO: Drekker Brewing: SMol Blue Razz
items.description: A light bodied, bright fruited sour with the perfect amount of blueberry and raspberry, and it’s tasting juuuuuust right (12 fl. oz., 6% ABV).
items.ingredientsText: A light bodied, bright fruited sour with the perfect amount of blueberry and raspberry, and it’s tasting juuuuuust right (12 fl. oz., 6% ABV).
